title: Opening Keynote: The Future of AI in Software Engineering
description: An insightful look into how artificial intelligence is shaping the landscape of software development and what to expect in the coming years.

title: Practical Microservices with Node.js
description: Learn how to design, build, and deploy scalable microservices using Node.js and best practices.

title: Mastering Modern CSS Layouts
description: Dive deep into CSS Grid and Flexbox to create stunning and responsive layouts with ease.

title: Introduction to WebAssembly
description: Explore the basics of WebAssembly and how it can bring near-native performance to web applications.

title: Secure Coding Practices for Web Applications
description: Understand common web vulnerabilities and learn how to implement secure coding practices to protect your applications.

title: DevOps Beyond the Basics: CI/CD with Kubernetes
description: Elevate your DevOps game with advanced CI/CD pipelines integrated with Kubernetes for seamless deployments.
